title: MCP admission transient 503 contract
description: Machine-readable gateway signal for POST /mcp requests rejected while the gateway is still warming and not yet ready for MCP admission.

error.description: Human-readable error string. Must keep the ADMISSION_REJECTED_WARMING prefix for compatibility.

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code for warming-state admission rejection.

transient.description: Gateway-authored marker that this response is transient and therefore retryable within a bounded client retry budget.

authorized.description: Retry is explicitly authorized by the gateway signal.

basis.description: Consumers may retry because the gateway emitted this contract, not because the client guessed from HTTP 503 alone.

expectation.description: Consumers must apply a bounded retry loop rather than retrying indefinitely.

gateway_state.description: Existing readiness vocabulary value associated with this transient admission rejection. No new public lifecycle state is introduced by this contract.
